title: Change main (name) column

posts.author: Liam (Liam Shannon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

Sometimes when building a board, I’m not sure which column would be best suited for using as the primary ‘name’ column (under the group title).

This happens most often when importing data from an external source.

image1621×160 11.3 KB

Currently I do not see a way that I could switch which of the columns is the ‘primary’ column.

image1621×164 14.3 KB

My current workaround is to rearrange the data in say excel and re-importing. This is awkward if I have already started to build automations and comments into the board, as non-exportable information is lost.

Is there a better way? Or is something on the way to address this?

Kind Regards,
Liam

posts.author: david.major (David Major)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also be interested in this, if anyone knows?

posts.author: Bibi (Bibi)
posts.cookedHtml: I also like to know if this is possible.
